title: Transcript:2016 Easter event
wikitext:
{{Transcript|event}}
{{Transcript list|Easter Bunny}}

==Starting out==
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Terrible... just terrible...
* '''Player:''' What happened this time?
* '''Easter Bunny:''' It's the evil chocolate chicken you see, it's destroyed everything.
* '''Player:''' What chicken? Look, you're all ruffled, calm down and tell me what happened.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' While preparing to produce this year's chocolate eggs, I was visited by a travelling merchant. He persuaded me to buy this potion for making the chocolate taste better...
* '''Player:''' Let me guess... it didn't.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' No... as soon as I added it to the mix, it started to bubble and that terrible thing came out of it. I bet that merchant was sent by Anti Santa.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Only he's locked up in Scape Rune{{sic}} for attempting to ruin Christmas.
* '''Player:''' Interesting, perhaps someone is carrying on his fowl work in his absence?
* '''Easter Bunny:''' *Sigh* Yes, the chicken - and it destroyed everything in the workshop, and ate some of the eggs that had presents in them.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Those presents have given the chicken the ability to teleport out of reach of anyone who attempts to capture it. Unless someone can startle the chicken into relinquishing all the presents, Easter's going to flop.
* '''Player:''' And I'm going to guess that you're asking me to do just that?
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Oh would you? That would be great!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to the Easter Bunny again===
* '''Easter Bunny:''' How are you getting on with the chicken?
* '''Player:''' Not touched a feather.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' But it's destroying my workshop! It's eating my supplies! It's got to be stopped!
* '''Player:''' Ok, ok, keep your ears on. I just had to pluck up my courage.
* {{tact|end}}

===Entering the workshop===
* '''Player:''' Now to find that pesky chicken and chase it off.
* {{tact|end}}

===Chasing the chicken===
* {{tcond|After catching it for the eighth time:}}
* '''Player:''' Ha! Had enough running away have you?
* {{tact|end}}

===Destroying the chicken===
* '''Player:''' What a fowl beast. Looks like I finally got rid of that pesky thing.
* {{tbox|pic=Chronicle detail.png|The chicken leaves behind an odd book.}}
* {{tact|end}}

==Finishing up==
* '''Player:''' I did it! That chicken really went to pieces!
* '''Easter Bunny:''' That's great! Thanks to you, Easter can go ahead, albeit a little late this year.
* '''Player:''' It dropped some kind of Chronicle for storing these teleport cards.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Oh, you can keep it for your hard work - if you need another or more cards, I'm sure Diango can help you out.
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Here, take these as a reward.
* {{tact|end}}

===Post event dialogue===
* '''Player:''' Hello! How's easter{{sic}} going?
* '''Easter Bunny:''' Great thank you!
* {{tact|end}}
